sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98020" key="sugxronismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγχρον-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agreement of time</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.21.1</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
